docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEE, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT FARINA FOCACCIA CUCINA ITALIANA, LLC,  A FORFEITED DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
